title: cladocarpa caumii
intro: Cladocarpa caumii is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Cladocarpa caumii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Cladocarpa caumii is often prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is commonly used in traditional folk medicine in the Philippines.
